description: Allowlist of source paths inside the dev-repo checkout that sync-content.mjs is permitted to read. Anything not on this list is invisible to the build. The dev-repo checkout's root is referenced as the sync-script's --dev-repo argument; every entry's 'source' is relative to that root.

sources.notes: Privacy_Policy.md and any future policies. Transform + write lands in US-156.
Curated PNG screenshots. Sharp-driven AVIF/WebP/PNG triplet pipeline lands in US-158; per-screenshot allowlist file at config/screenshot-allowlist.json drives selection.
Only files with frontmatter `published: true` are copied. Frontmatter gate lands in US-159.
Apple Help Book renders as a single page with H2-anchored sections. Transform lands in US-160.
